description: Overnight in Greifswald. Sleeping in a barn, very primitive, no lights. Gleaned potatoes, outing to the Baltic coast with coffee and cake.
Arrived at the barracks. Counted as replacement troops, less pay. A very mixed bunch, 18-50 years old. Written secrecy pledge. Theater, cinema, military concert.

With advance party to arrange quarters. Private billet with the Rathko family on Ad.-Mitl.-Str., attic room. The battery is to be formed here; a lot of accounting-clerk work. Christmas 1943 at home in Chemnitz.
On an 8-day detail, picking up a rocket at Peenemünde with a prime mover. Saw interesting things at the rocket test station.

place: Training grounds in the General Government (toward Białystok)
description: Went on detail, first with the paymaster in Köslin. Wilhelm as accounting clerk in barracks, with quartermaster, radio, cinema, soldiers' home. Practice firings over several hundred kilometers toward Białystok.
Returned via Leipzig, stopover in Berlin. In Stettin visited the firms Trompetter and Geck. Arrived at midnight, just in time for the birthday celebration with cake.

For practice firings, so couldn't go home for Günter's birth on 08/11. V2 practice rockets from Greifswalder Oie to 110 km altitude; Wasserfall rockets a few kilometers from the launch site. Accounting clerk and quartermaster for 180 men.
